adr: 0027 (arm pattern + amended merge bar, generalized per skill)
design: 3-arm per skill: without / with-old / with-new; treatment = SKILL.md body + the skill's TOUCHED references (derived+asserted from the draft's git diff — ADR 0024's derive+assert requirement, ratified from issue #63), symmetric across with-arms
executor: claude -p --model sonnet, CLAUDE_EFFORT=medium, empty external cwd, tools denied (Skill Task Read Grep Glob Bash Edit Write WebFetch WebSearch NotebookEdit), user CLAUDE.md relocated (HERMETIC_RELOCATE_USER_MEMORY=1), prompt via stdin
grading: reused benchmarks/2026-07-08-skills-hermetic/{grade,prosecute_counts}.workflow.js (model sonnet), blind; met_final = min(grader_met, prosecutor_met) per ADR 0025; persisted evidence = the judgment that produced the final verdict (29 prosecutor overrides applied at persist)
